children.heading: Wage withholding for income tax purposes
children.label: a Wage withholding for income tax purposes

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The amount withheld as tax under chapter 24 shall be allowed to the recipient of the income as a credit against the tax imposed by this subtitle.

children.heading: Year of credit
children.label: 2 Year of credit
children.text: The amount so withheld during any calendar year shall be allowed as a credit for the taxable year beginning in such calendar year. If more than one taxable year begins in a calendar year, such amount shall be allowed as a credit for the last taxable year so beginning.

children.heading: Credit for special refunds of social security tax
children.label: b Credit for special refunds of social security tax

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary may prescribe regulations providing for the crediting against the tax imposed by this subtitle of the amount determined by the taxpayer or the Secretary to be allowable under section 6413(c) as a special refund of tax imposed on wages. The amount allowed as a credit under such regulations shall, for purposes of this subtitle, be considered an amount withheld at source as tax under section 3402.

children.heading: Year of credit
children.label: 2 Year of credit
children.text: Any amount to which paragraph (1) applies shall be allowed as a credit for the taxable year beginning in the calendar year during which the wages were received. If more than one taxable year begins in the calendar year, such amount shall be allowed as a credit for the last taxable year so beginning.

children.heading: Special rule for backup withholding
children.label: c Special rule for backup withholding
children.text: Any credit allowed by subsection (a) for any amount withheld under section 3406 shall be allowed for the taxable year of the recipient of the income in which the income is received.
